titleStmt.title: SII 41.107: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 107. (A.R. No. 106 of 1905.) Maṉṉārkōyil, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Gōpālasvamin temple at Maṉṉārkōyil.

p.hi: Chōḻa-Pāṇḍya. Jaṭavarman alias Uḍaiyar Sundara-Chōḻa Pāṇḍya, Year 14 = 1035 A.D.

summary.p: Registers the sale of the village Mānābharana-chadurvēdhimañgalam, a brahmadēeya in Muḷḷi-Nāḍu, which was the property of two brahmanas of Nigrilichōḻa-chaturvedhimangalam named Govindan Madava-bhattan and Govindan Thiruvikiraman to the temple of Rajendracola-vinnagar-paramasvamikal at Rajendra-chaturvedhimangalam. It is stated that the brahmanas had originally, obtained the village as the gurus, probably, of the ruling dynasty.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīcun=taracoḻapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu Irācairācap pāṇṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmateyam śrīirā
ja Irājaccaruppetimaṅkalattu śrīirājentracoḻaviṇṇakar paramasvāmikaḷukku Uttamacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmateyam nikarilicoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu kovin=taṉmātavapaṭṭaṉum tampi ko
vin=taṉ tiruvikkiramaṉum Iviruvom viṟṟukkuṭutta Ūrāvatu nāṅkaḷ kuruparamparam peṟṟuṭaiyomāy Aṉubhavittu varukiṟa Innāṭṭu brahmateyam māṉamāṉāparaṇac caruppetimaṅkalam viṟṟukkuṭuttoṅ ko
vin=taṉ mātavapaṭṭaṉum kovin=taṉ tiruvikkiramaṉum Ivviruvom Irājentracoḻa viṇṇakara paramasvāmikaḷukku Ipparicu viṟṟuk kuṭutta māṉāparaṇac caruppetimaṅkalattukkup perunāṉkellaiyāva
tumelellai tirupiṭaimarutūr tevar tevatāṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai nikarilicoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattoṭu muṭppaṭṭa nalla ṭimāṉ kuṟucci Ellaikku teṟkum ki
ḻellai Ivvūroṭum Akappaṭṭa vīramallamaṅkalattu Ellaikku mēṟkum teṉellai viyāmallamaṅkalattūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum Āka Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi yey
meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum puṟṟum teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭi Āmai tavaḻvitum Eppeṟpaṭṭatum Ivvūrk kuṭiyirukkaiyum Uṭpaṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiyey vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu Emmili
cainta vilaipporuḷellām kaiyileyaṟak koṇṭu Ituvey vilaiōlaiyum poruḷcelavolaiyumāvitākavum Ituvallatu veṟu vilaimāvaṟutipporuḷc celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭamaiyi
ṉṟi vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷarak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiōlai ceytu niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭuttom kovin=taṉ mātavapaṭṭaṉum kovin=taṉ tiruvikkiramaṉum Iviruvom Irājentracoḻa viṇṇakar paramasvā
mikaḷukku Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ marutūr nārāyaṇaṉ tevatevecaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭiaṟiveṉ marutūr kaṇṇaṉ mātevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Aṇuppūr poṉṉaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
